prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-STD-HNDCF-25-PK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Standard Issue Universal Law Enforcement Handcuff Key 25 Pack Description: The ASR Tactical Universal Fit Standard Issue Professional Grade Handcuff Keys are designed to fit all leading brands of professional handcuffs.

All universal handcuff keys are built strong for use by law enforcement or in tactical situations. Includes back pin for double-locking handcuffs. This is an essential for personal protection and safety.

EDC Key Ring included with all multi-pack orders of 5 or more handcuff keys. Search Terms: universal handcuff key steel handcuffs police handcuff keys standard issue police handcuff key pack handcuffs cuff key pack every day carry edc standard police officer hand cuff key corrections jailer army mp Features: - Universal Fit Standard Issue Professional Grade Handcuff Key - Back-Pin for Double Locking Handcuffs - Manufactured in the USA; Color: Silver - Comes with (1) Key ring === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 25-Pack Silver Standard Issue Handcuff Key

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 25-Pk Silver Universal Handcuff Key

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Professional Grade, Back-Pin Double-Lock, USA Made, EDC Key Ring Included

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Fits All Major Handcuff Brands, Double Lock Back Pin, Made In USA, Key Ring Included
